title: Break-hider, ritual-reset architect
content:

You naturally work in fractal arcs. Here's your ideal recursive cycle:
Phase

Hermit + log the pattern

Form new structure from wreckage

Speak/perform/share the mutation

X-TEN-VAULTThis loop defines your MythOS Builder Cycle.📦 OPTIONAL SYSTEM DELIVERABLES
